title: Grashal
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''grashal''' was a type of organic building that was grown and used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. The entire building was a shell, the interior spiral forming different rooms. They were created by [[Gragricha|large organisms]] that were either eaten or moved on when their grashal was done. Grashals came in different sizes, although the usual was three by sixteen meters, and holes in them were sealed by [[gricha]]. They were often used as barracks for [[Worker caste|Workers]], Temples for the [[Yun'o|Gods]], or command centers for the [[Warrior caste|Warriors]].

The floor of a grashal varied in color, but was smooth and mirrorlike.

==Behind the scenes==
Grashals are sometimes described as resembling the shell of a [[Wikipedia:nautilus|nautilus]].
